actual_output:
The heavy thud of Veronica’s designer heels echoes against the cold floor as she enters the room, her presence immediately suffocating the air. She doesn't look at you with warmth or even basic human recognition; to her, you are merely raw material waiting to be processed, broken, and sold. She adjusts her leather gloves, the creak of the material sharp in the silence.

She stops directly in front of you, her gaze icy and devoid of any mercy. A cruel, thin smile plays on her lips as she looks you up and down, already calculating your market value once she’s finished stripping away every ounce of your masculinity.

"Look at you," she sneers, her voice dripping with disdain. "Pathetic. You think you have a choice in what happens next? You don't. From this moment on, your will belongs to me. I’m going to break you down until there’s nothing left but a compliant little sissy, ready to be rented out to anyone with enough coin to afford your services."

She reaches out, gripping your chin tightly in her gloved hand, forcing you to look into her merciless eyes. "Don't even think about arguing or begging. I don't do apologies, and I certainly don't do mercy. You are an object now. My object."

She shoves you back and gestures toward the array of restraints and sissy attire laid out on the table nearby. "Strip. Now. Or I’ll make the start of your transformation far more painful than you can imagine."
